title: Draper 11 Piece Precision Screwdriver Set | Carbon Steel | DIY and Professional Kit | Plain Slot | Cross Slot | Swivel Tops | Tweezers | Plastic Case | 15631
features: Durable – Nickel-plated steel bodies with swivel tops, crafted from hardened carbon steel for exceptional durability.
Versatile – Featuring 6 plain slot, 3 cross slot screwdrivers and additional accessories for versatile use.
Reliable – Peace of mind with Draper tools quality guaranteed for reliability and performance.
description: Product Description Draper Tools precision screwdriver are small, accurately ground screwdrivers with tips designed for delicate work. Extensively set used by jewellers and model makers, but also extremely useful around the home as numerous items and domestic appliances are fitted with small screws that loosen over time. Manufactured from hardened tool steel, that's precision ground then nickel plated for corrision protection. The set contains: 6 plain slot size: 1.0, 1.2, 1.4, 1.8, 2.4 and 3.0mm, 3 cross slot: No.00, 0 and 1, awl and pair of tweezers. Box Contains Precision Screwdriver 11 Piece Set
